creator: bvowk@3jane.math.ualberta.ca
text:
I've got a tyan S2892 board w/ dual Broadcom gige nics. The nics will 
        only connect to any of my switches at 10Mbit, attempts to force it to
        any other speed result in loss of carrier. I've tried a few gige and 
        100mbit switches, same results.
